title: Sun of the Planet of the Red Nebula
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Red}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Star |image=[[File:Red_Nebula_sun.jpg]] |name=Sun of the Planet of the Red Nebula |region=[[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] |sector= |system=[[Red Nebula system]] |coordinates=G-21 |xyz= |routes= |distance= |orbits=[[Planet of the Red Nebula]] |stations= |asteroids= |other=[[Red Nebula comet field]] |class= |diameter= }} {{Quote|The ''Nova Prince!'' B-but… it's not heading ''out'' of the nebula! It's—''"
"''It's plunging at maximum sub-light speed on a computer-set ''collision course'' with our sun!|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and a [[Unidentified priest (Red Nebula)|Red Nebula priest]]|[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]]}} The '''Sun of the Planet of the Red Nebula''' was a star around which the [[Planet of the Red Nebula]] orbited. It was an accessory to the suicide of [[Klysk]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 50}} {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Red Nebula locations]] [[Category:Stars in Wild Space]]
